notes: Run through Google DeepMind's native agentic harness (Antigravity IDE). Single-shot: no clarifying questions, worked on first run. Utilizes Three.js. Renders detailed 3D meshes for Michael Jackson (red leather jacket, fedora), Pepe the Frog (green skin, bulging eyes), Donald Trump (blue suit, sweeping yellow hair, red tie), and Elon Musk (dark shirt, grey pants) on a cemetery stage. Features volumetric-like spotlights, fog, grass, gravestones, spooky trees, full moon background, OrbitControls, and animated Thriller choreography phases (Zombie walk, Claw snap, and Hip sway).
